title: Judges will not be swayed by what is depicted in movies: Kerala High Court
description: The Kerala High Court on Friday expressed its confidence in the ability of judicial officers to remain impartial and unswayed by depictions of cases they are handling in films or other forms of media [Abdal Rahim H v. Union of India & Ors.].A Vacation Bench of Justices Gopinath P and Johnson John was hearing an appeal seeking to restrain the release of the Malayalam film 'Kaalam Paranja Kadha', which is allegedly inspired by the Venjaramoodu mass murder case.
